positive: A stylized minimalist woodland animal silhouette, featuring a group of diverse creatures (fox, deer, owl, fox) intertwined in a harmonious forest grouping. The style should be a sophisticated deep indigo and burnt orange color palette, rendered with clean, smooth lines and strong negative space contrast. The composition must be centrally balanced and suitable for a repeating print design, with the subjects interacting playfully but cohesively. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, ink wash style, vector art quality, solid color fields, designed for screen printing on apparel.
